# Yarrasys Extensions

> An umbrella collection of open-source agent skills for Claude Code and the broader AI-agent
> ecosystem. Each skill lives under `skills/<name>/` with its own SKILL.md and is installable
> individually via the Skills CLI: `npx skills add yarrasys/extensions@<name>`. The repo also doubles
> as a Claude Code **plugin marketplace** — some skills ship a plugin wrapper that adds enforced
> hooks, MCP tools, and slash commands on top of the skill.

## Skills

### kdbx — KeePassXC credentials skill

> Manages per-project, per-environment credentials in key-file-only KeePassXC `.kdbx` vaults
> (KDBX4 + Argon2). Replaces `.env` as the source of truth for secrets, API keys, and tokens, and
> injects them into commands without printing them into the transcript, logs, or shell history.
> Built for AI coding agents: the agent handles entry paths and variable names only — it never
> authors or observes a secret value.

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/skills/kdbx/SKILL.md): agent-facing skill definition — when to use, invocation, the 13 operations, the agent/human role boundary, security do/don'ts.
- [Skill README](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/skills/kdbx/README.md): overview, install, quickstart, comparison.
- [references/schema.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/skills/kdbx/references/schema.md): the `.keepassxc.json` pointer schema and entry-path grammar.
- [references/security.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/skills/kdbx/references/security.md): threat model, `run` trust boundary, rotation and leak runbooks.
- [references/fallback.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/skills/kdbx/references/fallback.md): read-only `keepassxc-cli` commands for environments without uv.

Operations: `init · set · get · list · delete · mv · run · export · import · check · envs · rekey · install-launcher`.

Roles: agents read/use secrets (`run`/`get`/`list`/`check`/`envs`/`init`); writes (`set`/`delete`/`mv`/`import`/`rekey`) and value-exposure (`get --reveal`/`--clip`, `export`) are a human role. The plugin's `PreToolUse` hook enforces this; the bare skill states it as a contract.

Install (skill): `npx skills add yarrasys/extensions@kdbx` · Requires [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/);
the engine `pykeepass` (GPL-3.0) is fetched at runtime, never bundled.

Install (plugin): `/plugin marketplace add yarrasys/extensions` then `/plugin install kdbx@yarrasys-extensions` — adds the enforced role-guard + leak-guard hook, a safe MCP server (no value-crossing tools), and `/kdbx:*` commands.

### deepseek — offload-to-DeepSeek delegation skill

> Delegates a bounded, simple dev task (docstrings, formatting, boilerplate, tests, comments,
> rename) to a nested headless `claude` process running on DeepSeek's Anthropic-compatible
> endpoint, so the parent session's own tokens aren't spent on mechanical work. Isolates the
> child in a git worktree by default and returns a reviewable `.patch`; `--in-place` is an
> opt-in that refuses on a dirty tree. Every run ends in a compact JSON receipt, never prose.

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/skills/deepseek/SKILL.md): agent-facing skill definition — when to use, invocation, the 5 operations, autonomy modes, receipt statuses, security note.

Operations: `delegate · apply · init · check · config`.

Autonomy modes (`.deepseek.json` → `mode`): `explicit` (delegate only when asked) · `suggest`
(propose, wait for confirmation) · `auto` (delegate within `allowTasks`/`allowGlobs`/`denyGlobs`/
`maxCostUsdPerRun`, always isolated). Guardrails: recursion guard (`DEEPSEEK_DELEGATE_DEPTH`),
deny-globs, per-run cost cap — `maxCostUsdPerSession` is parsed but not enforced in v1.

Install (skill): `npx skills add yarrasys/extensions@deepseek` · Requires [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/),
`git`, and the `claude` CLI on `PATH`; the DeepSeek API key is resolved via [kdbx](skills/kdbx) or
`$DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` — the agent never authors or observes the key value.

## Repository

- [README](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/README.md): the collection index.
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) · [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/blob/main/AGENTS.md) (guidance for AI agents working in this repo).
- Per-skill design specs and plans live under each skill, e.g. [skills/kdbx/docs/](https://github.com/yarrasys/extensions/tree/main/skills/kdbx/docs/superpowers).
